feed.title: Teja Swaroop
feed.subtitle: A blog intended to document the things I learn everyday in programming, penetration testing, and computers in general.

entry.title: Basic Computer Architecture - The CPU and Memory

link.title: Basic Computer Architecture - The CPU and Memory

entry.summary:
According to the Von Newmann architecture, computers are composed of two main components,
The Central Processing Unit (CPU) The Memory
The CPU The CPU contains the following components,
Program Counter Instruction Decoder Data bus Registers Arithmetic and Logical unit (ALU)
Program Counter A program counter (PC) holds the address of the next instruction to execute. A compute...
